turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月25日，北泵房站有22个小时有效监测记录，PM2.5日均值为17.59，AQI日均值为54.41；当日PM2.5小时值范围为5.00—29.00，AQI小时值范围为29.00—104.00，整体以低颗粒物浓度、轻度波动为主，但存在短时AQI升高现象。

北泵房站周边企业活动影响分析显示：3公里和5公里范围内未识别到纳入统计的涉气企业；10公里范围内有1家涉气企业，但该企业在2025年6月25日无小时排放记录，颗粒物、氮氧化物、二氧化硫和一氧化碳排放统计量均为0。因此，基于已查询数据，北泵房站当日污染水平未显示出可量化的近距离企业排放贡献。

Ligong station 未能在现有监测站数据中被唯一识别或匹配，因此无法计算该站2025年6月25日的PM2.5日均值、AQI日均值，也无法开展与北泵房站之间的定量对比分析。当前已存储结果为：Ligong站PM2.5均值和AQI均值缺失；北泵房站PM2.5均值为17.59，AQI均值为54.41。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 先定位两个监测站，并检查当日小时记录量；不输出明细，仅输出汇总
station_lookup_sql = text("""
WITH candidates AS (
  SELECT id, name, coordinate
  FROM air_quality_station
  WHERE name ILIKE '%Ligong%' OR name ILIKE '%North Pump%' OR name ILIKE '%Pump House%'
     OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%北泵%' OR name LIKE '%泵房%' OR name LIKE '%北水泵%'
),
matched AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN name ILIKE '%Ligong%' OR name LIKE '%理工%' THEN 'ligong'
      WHEN name ILIKE '%North Pump%' OR name ILIKE '%Pump House%' OR name LIKE '%北泵%' OR name LIKE '%泵房%' OR name LIKE '%北水泵%' THEN 'pumphouse'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS target,
    id, name, coordinate
  FROM candidates
)
SELECT target, COUNT(*) AS n_candidates, STRING_AGG(id::text || ':' || name, ' | ' ORDER BY id) AS candidate_summary
FROM matched
GROUP BY target
ORDER BY target;
""")
station_lookup = pd.read_sql(station_lookup_sql, engine)
print("站点匹配汇总：")
print(station_lookup.to_string(index=False))

# 若匹配成功，计算2025-06-25全天小时均值，并按多尺度缓冲区汇总周边企业活动
analysis_sql = text("""
WITH selected_stations AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (target)
    target, id AS station_id, name, coordinate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN name ILIKE '%Ligong%' OR name LIKE '%理工%' THEN 'ligong'
        WHEN name ILIKE '%North Pump%' OR name ILIKE '%Pump House%' OR name LIKE '%北泵%' OR name LIKE '%泵房%' OR name LIKE '%北水泵%' THEN 'pumphouse'
      END AS target,
      id, name, coordinate
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE name ILIKE '%Ligong%' OR name ILIKE '%North Pump%' OR name ILIKE '%Pump House%'
       OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%北泵%' OR name LIKE '%泵房%' OR name LIKE '%北水泵%'
  ) s
  WHERE target IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY target, id
),
air_stats AS (
  SELECT
    ss.target,
    ss.name,
    COUNT(h.timestamp) AS hourly_count,
    AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
    AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
    MIN(h.pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
    MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
    MIN(h.aqi)::float AS min_aqi,
    MAX(h.aqi)::float AS max_aqi
  FROM selected_stations ss
  LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
    ON h.station_id = ss.station_id
   AND h.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
   AND h.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
  GROUP BY ss.target, ss.name
),
enterprise_buffers AS (
  SELECT
    ss.target,
    b.radius_m,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) AS enterprise_count,
    COUNT(e.timestamp) AS emission_hour_count,
    SUM(e.pm)::float AS sum_pm,
    SUM(e.nox)::float AS sum_nox,
    SUM(e.so2)::float AS sum_so2,
    SUM(e.co)::float AS sum_co
  FROM selected_stations ss
  CROSS JOIN (VALUES (3000), (5000), (10000)) AS b(radius_m)
  LEFT JOIN polluting_company pc
    ON ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, ss.coordinate, b.radius_m)
  LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
    ON e.company_id = pc.id
   AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
   AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
  GROUP BY ss.target, b.radius_m
),
top_enterprise AS (
  SELECT target, radius_m, company_count_with_emission, total_pm, total_nox, total_so2
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ss.target,
      10000 AS radius_m,
      COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ss.target) AS company_count_with_emission,
      SUM(SUM(e.pm)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss.target)::float AS total_pm,
      SUM(SUM(e.nox)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss.target)::float AS total_nox,
      SUM(SUM(e.so2)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss.target)::float AS total_so2,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.target ORDER BY SUM(e.pm) DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
    FROM selected_stations ss
    JOIN polluting_company pc
      ON ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, ss.coordinate, 10000)
    JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
      ON e.company_id = pc.id
     AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
     AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
    GROUP BY ss.target, pc.id
  ) x
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT
  a.target, a.name, a.hourly_count, a.mean_pm25, a.mean_aqi, a.min_pm25, a.max_pm25, a.min_aqi, a.max_aqi,
  eb.radius_m, eb.enterprise_count, eb.emission_hour_count, eb.sum_pm, eb.sum_nox, eb.sum_so2, eb.sum_co,
  te.company_count_with_emission AS emit_company_count_10km,
  te.total_pm AS emit_total_pm_10km, te.total_nox AS emit_total_nox_10km, te.total_so2 AS emit_total_so2_10km
FROM air_stats a
LEFT JOIN enterprise_buffers eb ON eb.target = a.target
LEFT JOIN top_enterprise te ON te.target = a.target AND te.radius_m = 10000
ORDER BY a.target, eb.radius_m;
""")
analysis_df = pd.read_sql(analysis_sql, engine)

if set(analysis_df["target"].dropna()) >= {"ligong", "pumphouse"}:
    lg = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"] == "ligong"].iloc[0]
    ph = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"] == "pumphouse"].iloc[0]
    mean_pm25_ligong = float(lg["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(lg["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
    mean_aqi_ligong = float(lg["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(lg["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")
    mean_pm25_pumphouse = float(ph["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(ph["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
    mean_aqi_pumphouse = float(ph["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(ph["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")
else:
    mean_pm25_ligong = mean_aqi_ligong = mean_pm25_pumphouse = mean_aqi_pumphouse = float("nan")

print("\n污染与周边企业活动汇总：")
print(analysis_df.to_string(index=False))
print("\n已存储均值变量：")
print({
    "mean_pm25_ligong": mean_pm25_ligong,
    "mean_aqi_ligong": mean_aqi_ligong,
    "mean_pm25_pumphouse": mean_pm25_pumphouse,
    "mean_aqi_pumphouse": mean_aqi_pumphouse
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 进一步扩展“Ligong”的中文可能写法，并结合北泵房所在区域核查候选站点
explore_sql = text("""
WITH pump AS (
  SELECT id, name, coordinate, district_id, city_id
  FROM air_quality_station
  WHERE name = '北泵房'
  LIMIT 1
),
ligong_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    id, name, district_id, city_id,
    CASE
      WHEN name ILIKE '%Ligong%' THEN 'Ligong'
      WHEN name LIKE '%李公%' THEN '李公'
      WHEN name LIKE '%理工%' THEN '理工'
      WHEN name LIKE '%立功%' THEN '立功'
      WHEN name LIKE '%利工%' THEN '利工'
      WHEN name LIKE '%丽宫%' THEN '丽宫'
      WHEN name LIKE '%礼公%' THEN '礼公'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS match_type
  FROM air_quality_station
  WHERE name ILIKE '%Ligong%'
     OR name LIKE '%李公%' OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%立功%'
     OR name LIKE '%利工%' OR name LIKE '%丽宫%' OR name LIKE '%礼公%'
),
same_area AS (
  SELECT a.id, a.name,
         CASE WHEN a.district_id = p.district_id THEN 'same_district'
              WHEN a.city_id = p.city_id THEN 'same_city'
              ELSE 'other' END AS area_relation
  FROM air_quality_station a
  CROSS JOIN pump p
  WHERE a.district_id = p.district_id OR a.city_id = p.city_id
)
SELECT 'ligong_candidates' AS group_name, match_type AS subgroup, COUNT(*) AS n,
       STRING_AGG(id::text || ':' || name, ' | ' ORDER BY id) AS summary
FROM ligong_candidates
GROUP BY match_type
UNION ALL
SELECT 'pump_area_stations' AS group_name, area_relation AS subgroup, COUNT(*) AS n,
       STRING_AGG(id::text || ':' || name, ' | ' ORDER BY id) AS summary
FROM same_area
GROUP BY area_relation
ORDER BY group_name, subgroup;
""")
explore_df = pd.read_sql(explore_sql, engine)
print("Ligong候选与北泵房同区域站点汇总：")
print(explore_df.to_string(index=False))

# 使用扩展匹配重新计算并存储两个站点当日均值；若Ligong仍未唯一匹配，则保留为NaN并输出匹配状态
calc_sql = text("""
WITH selected_stations AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (target)
    target, id AS station_id, name, coordinate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN name = '北泵房' THEN 'pumphouse'
        WHEN name ILIKE '%Ligong%' OR name LIKE '%李公%' OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%立功%'
          OR name LIKE '%利工%' OR name LIKE '%丽宫%' OR name LIKE '%礼公%' THEN 'ligong'
      END AS target,
      id, name, coordinate
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE name = '北泵房'
       OR name ILIKE '%Ligong%'
       OR name LIKE '%李公%' OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%立功%'
       OR name LIKE '%利工%' OR name LIKE '%丽宫%' OR name LIKE '%礼公%'
  ) s
  WHERE target IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY target, id
),
air_stats AS (
  SELECT
    ss.target, ss.name,
    COUNT(h.timestamp) AS hourly_count,
    AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
    AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
    MIN(h.pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
    MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
    MIN(h.aqi)::float AS min_aqi,
    MAX(h.aqi)::float AS max_aqi
  FROM selected_stations ss
  LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
    ON h.station_id = ss.station_id
   AND h.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
   AND h.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
  GROUP BY ss.target, ss.name
),
enterprise_stats AS (
  SELECT
    ss.target,
    b.radius_m,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) AS enterprise_count,
    COUNT(e.timestamp) AS emission_hour_count,
    SUM(e.pm)::float AS sum_pm,
    SUM(e.nox)::float AS sum_nox,
    SUM(e.so2)::float AS sum_so2,
    SUM(e.co)::float AS sum_co
  FROM selected_stations ss
  CROSS JOIN (VALUES (3000), (5000), (10000)) AS b(radius_m)
  LEFT JOIN polluting_company pc
    ON ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, ss.coordinate, b.radius_m)
  LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
    ON e.company_id = pc.id
   AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
   AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
  GROUP BY ss.target, b.radius_m
)
SELECT
  a.target, a.name, a.hourly_count, a.mean_pm25, a.mean_aqi,
  a.min_pm25, a.max_pm25, a.min_aqi, a.max_aqi,
  e.radius_m, e.enterprise_count, e.emission_hour_count, e.sum_pm, e.sum_nox, e.sum_so2, e.sum_co
FROM air_stats a
LEFT JOIN enterprise_stats e ON e.target = a.target
ORDER BY a.target, e.radius_m;
""")
analysis_df = pd.read_sql(calc_sql, engine)

lg_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"] == "ligong"]
ph_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"] == "pumphouse"]

mean_pm25_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")
mean_pm25_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")

print("\n复算后的污染与周边企业活动汇总：")
print(analysis_df.to_string(index=False))
print("\n已存储均值变量：")
print({
    "mean_pm25_ligong": mean_pm25_ligong,
    "mean_aqi_ligong": mean_aqi_ligong,
    "mean_pm25_pumphouse": mean_pm25_pumphouse,
    "mean_aqi_pumphouse": mean_aqi_pumphouse
})

import pandas as pd, math
from sqlalchemy import text

# 紧凑探索：只输出候选数量和少量样例，避免超长输出
station_sql = text("""
SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id,
       ST_X(coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE name = '北泵房'
   OR name ILIKE '%Ligong%'
   OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%李公%' OR name LIKE '%立功%' OR name LIKE '%利工%' OR name LIKE '%礼工%' OR name LIKE '%里工%' OR name LIKE '%梨工%'
   OR name LIKE '%工%' OR name LIKE '%公%'
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 200;
""")
st = pd.read_sql(station_sql, engine)

pump = st[st["name"].eq("北泵房")]
lig_cand = st[
    st["name"].str.contains("Ligong", case=False, na=False) |
    st["name"].str.contains("理工|李公|立功|利工|礼工|里工|梨工", regex=True, na=False)
].copy()

print("候选站点紧凑汇总：")
print({
    "north_pump_house_matches": int(len(pump)),
    "ligong_direct_matches": int(len(lig_cand)),
    "station_sample_count_with_gong_or_gongchar": int(len(st)),
    "ligong_candidate_sample": lig_cand[["id","name"]].head(10).to_dict("records")
})

# 若直接未匹配Ligong，则在北泵房同城市内列出少量名称样例，辅助确认；不打印全部
if len(pump):
    pump_city = int(pump.iloc[0]["city_id"])
    city_sample_sql = text("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE city_id = :city_id
    """)
    city_count = pd.read_sql(city_sample_sql, engine, params={"city_id": pump_city}).iloc[0]["n"]
    city_names_sql = text("""
    SELECT id, name
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE city_id = :city_id
    ORDER BY id
    LIMIT 30
    """)
    city_sample = pd.read_sql(city_names_sql, engine, params={"city_id": pump_city})
    print("北泵房同城市站点数量及样例：")
    print({"same_city_station_count": int(city_count), "sample": city_sample.to_dict("records")})

# 选定站点：北泵房明确；Ligong仅在有直接候选时选第一个，否则保持缺失
selected = []
if len(pump):
    selected.append(("pumphouse", int(pump.iloc[0]["id"])))
if len(lig_cand):
    selected.append(("ligong", int(lig_cand.iloc[0]["id"])))

if selected:
    values_clause = ",".join([f"('{t}',{sid})" for t, sid in selected])
    analysis_sql = text(f"""
    WITH selected_stations(target, station_id) AS (VALUES {values_clause}),
    air_stats AS (
      SELECT ss.target, aqs.name,
             COUNT(h.timestamp) AS hourly_count,
             AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
             AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
             MIN(h.pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
             MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
             MIN(h.aqi)::float AS min_aqi,
             MAX(h.aqi)::float AS max_aqi
      FROM selected_stations ss
      JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON aqs.id = ss.station_id
      LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
        ON h.station_id = ss.station_id
       AND h.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
       AND h.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
      GROUP BY ss.target, aqs.name
    ),
    enterprise_stats AS (
      SELECT ss.target, b.radius_m,
             COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) AS enterprise_count,
             COUNT(e.timestamp) AS emission_hour_count,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.pm),0)::float AS sum_pm,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.nox),0)::float AS sum_nox,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.so2),0)::float AS sum_so2,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.co),0)::float AS sum_co
      FROM selected_stations ss
      JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON aqs.id = ss.station_id
      CROSS JOIN (VALUES (3000), (5000), (10000)) AS b(radius_m)
      LEFT JOIN polluting_company pc ON ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, aqs.coordinate, b.radius_m)
      LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
        ON e.company_id = pc.id
       AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
       AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
      GROUP BY ss.target, b.radius_m
    )
    SELECT a.target, a.name, a.hourly_count, a.mean_pm25, a.mean_aqi,
           a.min_pm25, a.max_pm25, a.min_aqi, a.max_aqi,
           e.radius_m, e.enterprise_count, e.emission_hour_count,
           e.sum_pm, e.sum_nox, e.sum_so2, e.sum_co
    FROM air_stats a
    JOIN enterprise_stats e ON e.target = a.target
    ORDER BY a.target, e.radius_m;
    """)
    analysis_df = pd.read_sql(analysis_sql, engine)
else:
    analysis_df = pd.DataFrame()

lg_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"].eq("ligong")] if len(analysis_df) else pd.DataFrame()
ph_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"].eq("pumphouse")] if len(analysis_df) else pd.DataFrame()

mean_pm25_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")
mean_pm25_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")

print("污染与企业影响紧凑汇总：")
if len(analysis_df):
    print(analysis_df.round(3).to_dict("records"))
else:
    print([])
print("已存储均值变量：")
print({
    "mean_pm25_ligong": mean_pm25_ligong,
    "mean_aqi_ligong": mean_aqi_ligong,
    "mean_pm25_pumphouse": mean_pm25_pumphouse,
    "mean_aqi_pumphouse": mean_aqi_pumphouse
})

import pandas as pd, math, re
from sqlalchemy import text

# 用全量站点名称做拼音/近似匹配，避免因英文“Ligong”与中文名称对应不明导致漏匹配；仅输出匹配摘要
all_stations = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id,
       ST_X(coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM air_quality_station
ORDER BY id
"""), engine)

try:
    from pypinyin import lazy_pinyin
    all_stations["pinyin"] = all_stations["name"].apply(lambda x: "".join(lazy_pinyin(str(x))))
except Exception:
    # 兜底：仅用常见中文写法识别
    all_stations["pinyin"] = ""

pattern_cn = r"理工|李公|立功|利工|礼工|里工|梨工|丽宫|李功|理公"
lig_all = all_stations[
    all_stations["name"].str.contains(pattern_cn, regex=True, na=False) |
    all_stations["pinyin"].str.contains("ligong", case=False, na=False)
].copy()

pump_all = all_stations[all_stations["name"].eq("北泵房")].copy()

print("Ligong与北泵房识别汇总：")
print({
    "total_station_count": int(len(all_stations)),
    "ligong_match_count": int(len(lig_all)),
    "ligong_matches_sample": lig_all[["id","name","pinyin"]].head(10).to_dict("records"),
    "north_pump_house_match_count": int(len(pump_all)),
    "north_pump_house": pump_all[["id","name"]].head(3).to_dict("records")
})

selected = []
if len(lig_all):
    selected.append(("ligong", int(lig_all.iloc[0]["id"])))
if len(pump_all):
    selected.append(("pumphouse", int(pump_all.iloc[0]["id"])))

if selected:
    values_clause = ",".join([f"('{t}',{sid})" for t, sid in selected])
    sql = text(f"""
    WITH selected_stations(target, station_id) AS (VALUES {values_clause}),
    air_stats AS (
      SELECT ss.target, aqs.name,
             COUNT(h.timestamp) AS hourly_count,
             AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
             AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
             MIN(h.pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
             MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
             MIN(h.aqi)::float AS min_aqi,
             MAX(h.aqi)::float AS max_aqi
      FROM selected_stations ss
      JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON aqs.id = ss.station_id
      LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
        ON h.station_id = ss.station_id
       AND h.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
       AND h.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
      GROUP BY ss.target, aqs.name
    ),
    enterprise_stats AS (
      SELECT ss.target, b.radius_m,
             COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) AS enterprise_count,
             COUNT(e.timestamp) AS emission_hour_count,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.pm),0)::float AS sum_pm,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.nox),0)::float AS sum_nox,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.so2),0)::float AS sum_so2,
             COALESCE(SUM(e.co),0)::float AS sum_co
      FROM selected_stations ss
      JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON aqs.id = ss.station_id
      CROSS JOIN (VALUES (3000), (5000), (10000)) AS b(radius_m)
      LEFT JOIN polluting_company pc ON ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, aqs.coordinate, b.radius_m)
      LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
        ON e.company_id = pc.id
       AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
       AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
      GROUP BY ss.target, b.radius_m
    )
    SELECT a.target, a.name, a.hourly_count, a.mean_pm25, a.mean_aqi,
           a.min_pm25, a.max_pm25, a.min_aqi, a.max_aqi,
           e.radius_m, e.enterprise_count, e.emission_hour_count,
           e.sum_pm, e.sum_nox, e.sum_so2, e.sum_co
    FROM air_stats a
    JOIN enterprise_stats e ON e.target = a.target
    ORDER BY a.target, e.radius_m;
    """)
    analysis_df = pd.read_sql(sql, engine)
else:
    analysis_df = pd.DataFrame()

lg_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"].eq("ligong")] if len(analysis_df) else pd.DataFrame()
ph_rows = analysis_df[analysis_df["target"].eq("pumphouse")] if len(analysis_df) else pd.DataFrame()

mean_pm25_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_ligong = float(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(lg_rows) and pd.notna(lg_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")
mean_pm25_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_pm25"]) else float("nan")
mean_aqi_pumphouse = float(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) if len(ph_rows) and pd.notna(ph_rows.iloc[0]["mean_aqi"]) else float("nan")

print("污染与企业影响汇总：")
print(analysis_df.round(3).to_dict("records") if len(analysis_df) else [])
print("已存储均值变量：")
print({
    "mean_pm25_ligong": mean_pm25_ligong,
    "mean_aqi_ligong": mean_aqi_ligong,
    "mean_pm25_pumphouse": mean_pm25_pumphouse,
    "mean_aqi_pumphouse": mean_aqi_pumphouse
})
